[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010010 3
1 000000111 3
2 010110000 3
3 111000110 5
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 011001010 4

01 10 001001000 2
12 21 001001000 2
23 32 100001000 2
34 43 000000000 a match 4 5 6
45 54 000000010 1
56 65 000000000 a match 4 5 6
67 76 010000000 1
70 07 011000010 3

02 20 001001010 3
13 31 000001100 2
24 42 001010010 3 match 0
35 53 000000100 1

57 75 000000110 2

71 17 001000100 2

50 05 000000010 1
